section_miscategorizations.text: Initiate naproxen and flexeril for back pain. Provide exercises for sitting and encourage limiting time on the couch.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Back pain is introduced only in the Plan without any mention in HPI, Findings, or Assessment. While the placement of these orders in the Plan section is correct, the absence of any prior documentation of back pain creates a minor organizational inconsistency that could confuse the reader about the origin of this problem.
